response.justification: The candidate is a talented full-stack engineer with strong software fundamentals and communication skills, but lacks the core technical requirements for this role. The resume shows only ~6 months of documented C++ experience (at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform development, minimal relational database expertise (focused on MongoDB/NoSQL instead), and no demonstrated capital markets or fixed-income domain knowledge. While the RIDE Capital position suggests some finance exposure, the technical depth in mandatory areas is insufficient.
strengths: Proven software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and clean code principles
Excellent communication and mentoring abilities demonstrated through talks, workshops, and open-source community leadership
Diverse technical background showing ability to learn new languages and domains quickly
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented C++ experience vs. 5-10 years required; no Windows platform development mentioned
Limited relational database expertise; career trajectory heavily weighted toward NoSQL (MongoDB) and web technologies rather than SQL Server/Oracle
No technical evidence of capital markets, fixed-income products, derivatives, or investment banking systems; RIDE Capital role lacks specifics

key_factors.factor: C++ and Windows platform expertise gap
